operational_scenes.scene_title: System Faults and Remote Monitoring Overview
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain system faults and remote monitoring capabilities
operational_intents: Describe system fault types and their indications
Explain limitations of remote monitoring via thin clients
Discuss current methods to access system status remotely
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by fault explanation and remote access discussion
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct shift from fault types to remote monitoring methods

operational_scenes.scene_title: Level 1 Support and Screen Sharing Practices
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe support call procedures and screen sharing limitations
operational_intents: Explain typical level 1 support call scenarios
Discuss screen sharing availability and constraints
Outline alternative data access methods during support
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Group related support and screen sharing content
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on support interaction and data access methods

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Status and Hop In Functionality
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain AGV status pop-ups and hop in controls
operational_intents: Describe hop in close and hop in disable functions
Explain how hop in affects tote handling and shoot exchanges
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Isolate AGV status and hop in operational details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct operational focus on AGV status and hop in

operational_scenes.scene_title: Introduction to Hot Bins and Priority Management
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Define hot bins and their priority in sorting
operational_intents: Explain what hot bins are and their urgency
Describe how hop in messages manage tote priorities
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment hot bins introduction and priority explanation
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clear topic shift to hot bins and priority handling

operational_scenes.scene_title: System State and Purge vs Close Out Functions
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain system states and differences between purge and close out
operational_intents: Describe system states like startup, bag out, shutdown
Clarify purge function versus close out in tote handling
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Group system state and tote handling functions
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Related operational controls on system and tote management

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Detail AGV command execution and recovery options
operational_intents: Explain commands to remove, recover, pause, and resume AGVs
Describe resend Geek command and retry logic
Outline recovery steps for missed callbacks or system restarts
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Separate AGV command and recovery discussion
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct operational focus on AGV command recovery
